heading: Availability of appropriations for operation of warehouses, garages, shops, and similar facilities
label: 1471c Availability of appropriations for operation of warehouses, garages, shops, and similar facilities
text: Appropriations in this title or appropriations made under this title in subsequent Energy and Water Development Appropriations Acts shall on and after , be available for operation of warehouses, garages, shops, and similar facilities, wherever consolidation of activities will contribute to efficiency, or economy, and said appropriations shall be reimbursed for services rendered to any other activity in the same manner as authorized by sections 1535 and 1536 of title 31: , That reimbursements for costs of supplies, materials, equipment, and for services rendered may be credited to the appropriation current at the time such reimbursements are received.11See References in Text note below.1October 2, 1992Provided
notes: References in TextThis title, referred to in text, is title II, Department of the Interior, of the Energy and Water Development Appropriations Act, 1993, of , , . For complete classification of title II to Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 102–377106 Stat. 1327Oct. 2, 1992
